name: @intentsolutionsio/ai-sdk-agents
description: Multi-agent orchestration with AI SDK v5 - handoffs, routing, and coordination for any AI provider (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google)

scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log(\"\\n→ This npm package is a tracking/proof artifact. Install the plugin via:\\n  ccpi install ai-sdk-agents\\n  or /plugin install ai-sdk-agents@claude-code-plugins-plus in Claude Code\\n\")"
